use_cases: Display customer testimonials with ratings on product or service pages
Showcase social proof through rotating customer quotes on landing pages
Present team or client feedback in a testimonial carousel format
Build trust signals with star ratings and customer images
Feature customer reviews in testimonial sections of marketing websites
ai_summary: A testimonial slider component built with React and Framer Motion that displays customer testimonials with star ratings, avatars, quotes, and smooth slide transitions. Uses shadcn/ui utility patterns with Lucide React icons and Tailwind CSS for styling. Features previous/next navigation controls with animated carousel transitions, suitable for showcasing social proof on SaaS landing pages, e-commerce product reviews, or portfolio sections.
